tagline.en: Imperial landmarks, contemporary city life, and an ideal first stop in China.
tagline.zh: 皇城地标、现代城市节奏与中国初次旅行的理想起点。

description.en: Beijing is a strong introduction to China, combining major historical landmarks, museums, city parks, and a polished modern travel experience.
description.zh: 北京是认识中国的绝佳起点，兼具重要历史地标、博物馆、城市公园与成熟的现代旅行体验。

highlights.en: The Forbidden City and Tiananmen area
highlights.zh: 故宫与天安门区域

highlights.en: Temple of Heaven and traditional park life
highlights.zh: 天坛与传统公园生活

highlights.en: A balanced mix of heritage and modern city energy
highlights.zh: 历史底蕴与现代城市活力并存

idealFor.en: First-time visitors, culture-focused travelers, and families.
idealFor.zh: 首次来华游客、文化型游客与家庭客群。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn usually offer the most comfortable weather.
bestTime.zh: 春秋两季通常最适合出行，天气最舒适。

description.en: Focus on the Forbidden City, Tiananmen, and nearby heritage areas for a classic Beijing introduction.
description.zh: 围绕故宫、天安门及周边文化区域展开，适合作为北京经典入门线路。

description.en: Add neighborhood walks, temple visits, and slower-paced city time for a more local feel.
description.zh: 加入街区散步、寺庙参观与慢节奏城市时光，更能感受本地生活气质。

description.en: Start with a relaxed arrival day, then build toward major landmarks.
description.zh: 先安排轻松抵达与城市认知，再逐步进入核心地标。

description.en: Combine historical sites with local dining and evening atmosphere.
description.zh: 把历史景点与本地餐饮、夜间氛围结合起来。

description.en: Keep one day open for shopping, museums, or a slower private experience.
description.zh: 保留一天机动时间，用于购物、博物馆或更轻松的私享体验。

tagline.en: A polished blend of skyline, lifestyle, dining, and modern China.
tagline.zh: 天际线、生活方式、美食与现代中国气质的精致结合。

description.en: Shanghai works well for travelers who want a stylish, efficient, and highly international city experience in China.
description.zh: 上海适合想要精致、高效、国际化城市体验的旅行者。

highlights.en: The Bund and Huangpu River skyline
highlights.zh: 外滩与黄浦江天际线

highlights.en: French Concession-style streets and lifestyle stops
highlights.zh: 法租界风格街区与生活方式体验

highlights.en: Excellent dining, shopping, and hotel options
highlights.zh: 丰富的餐饮、购物与酒店选择

idealFor.en: Urban travelers, couples, luxury-oriented guests, and stopover itineraries.
idealFor.zh: 城市型游客、情侣、轻奢客群与中转型行程。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn are comfortable, though the city works year-round.
bestTime.zh: 春秋较舒适，不过全年都适合安排。

description.en: Use the Bund and waterfront areas as a visual centerpiece of the stay.
description.zh: 把外滩与滨江区域作为行程的视觉核心。

description.en: Add café stops, shopping streets, and design-led neighborhoods.
description.zh: 加入咖啡馆、购物街区与设计感社区体验。

description.en: A first day focused on easy arrivals and a skyline walk.
description.zh: 首日以轻松抵达和夜景漫步为主。

description.en: Shape the day around cafés, shopping, and standout restaurants.
description.zh: 围绕咖啡馆、购物和特色餐厅来安排。

description.en: Leave room for museums, private transfers, or one last shopping stop.
description.zh: 保留时间用于博物馆、专车接送或最后一站购物。

tagline.en: Ancient capital heritage, food culture, and Silk Road depth in one destination.
tagline.zh: 古都底蕴、饮食文化与丝路纵深感汇聚于一城。

description.en: Xi'an gives travelers a clear sense of China’s historical depth, with ancient walls, major cultural landmarks, and strong local food culture.
description.zh: 西安能让旅行者清晰感受到中国的历史纵深，兼具古城墙、重要文化地标与浓厚的本地美食文化。

highlights.en: The Terracotta Army and imperial history
highlights.zh: 兵马俑与帝国历史

highlights.en: Ancient city walls and heritage walks
highlights.zh: 古城墙与文化步行体验

highlights.en: Strong local food culture and night atmosphere
highlights.zh: 鲜明的本地饮食文化与夜间氛围

idealFor.en: History lovers, students, and travelers building a classic China route.
idealFor.zh: 历史爱好者、学生群体与搭配经典中国线路的旅行者。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn usually give the best balance of comfort and sightseeing.
bestTime.zh: 春秋通常最平衡，适合观光与舒适度兼顾。

description.en: Build the stay around one of China’s most famous historical anchors.
description.zh: 围绕中国最著名的历史地标之一来设计行程。

description.en: Pair heritage streets with local dining and evening exploration.
description.zh: 把文化街区与本地餐饮、夜游结合起来。

description.en: Start with heritage areas and a first city walk.
description.zh: 先从文化区域和城市步行开始。

description.en: Mix cultural sites with signature local dining.
description.zh: 把文化景点与代表性本地餐饮搭配起来。

description.en: Leave time for shopping or an easy transfer out.
description.zh: 保留购物或轻松离城的时间。

tagline.en: Slow rhythm, rich food culture, pandas, and easy access to western China.
tagline.zh: 慢节奏、美食、熊猫与进入中国西部的轻松入口。

description.en: Chengdu works well as a relaxed base for travelers who want a comfortable city pace, strong food culture, and access to western China routes.
description.zh: 成都适合作为节奏舒缓的旅行基地，兼具美食文化与通往中国西部线路的便捷入口。

highlights.en: Panda experiences and easy sightseeing
highlights.zh: 熊猫体验与轻松观光

highlights.en: Famous spicy Sichuan cuisine
highlights.zh: 著名的川味辛香美食

highlights.en: A slower and more livable city pace
highlights.zh: 更慢、更宜居的城市节奏

idealFor.en: Couples, food-focused travelers, and guests who prefer a softer pace.
idealFor.zh: 情侣、以美食为主的旅行者以及偏好舒缓节奏的客群。

bestTime.en: Spring, autumn, and the cooler parts of the year are generally comfortable.
bestTime.zh: 春秋与较凉爽季节通常更舒适。

description.en: Use a panda visit as the day’s most memorable anchor.
description.zh: 把熊猫体验作为当天最有记忆点的核心。

description.en: Add hotpot, street snacks, and a deeper food story into the plan.
description.zh: 加入火锅、街头小吃与更完整的美食故事。

description.en: Keep the first day light and easy.
description.zh: 第一天安排轻松一点。

description.en: Center the day around nature, wildlife, and signature dining.
description.zh: 围绕自然、动物与代表性餐饮展开。

description.en: Leave time for shopping or a slower neighborhood walk.
description.zh: 保留购物或慢节奏街区漫步时间。

tagline.en: Dramatic urban landscape, hotpot culture, and one of China’s most visually striking cities.
tagline.zh: 立体城市景观、火锅文化与中国最具视觉冲击力的城市之一。

description.en: Chongqing is ideal for travelers who enjoy dramatic scenery, energetic urban atmosphere, and a strong local identity.
description.zh: 重庆适合喜欢立体城市景观、强烈城市氛围与鲜明本地气质的旅行者。

highlights.en: Layered city views and cable-car crossings
highlights.zh: 层叠城市景观与缆车跨江体验

highlights.en: Hotpot culture and night dining
highlights.zh: 火锅文化与夜间餐饮

highlights.en: A bold, cinematic city atmosphere
highlights.zh: 极具电影感的城市氛围

idealFor.en: Urban explorers, photographers, and travelers looking for a different Chinese city experience.
idealFor.zh: 城市探索者、摄影爱好者与想体验不同中国城市气质的游客。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn are generally more comfortable for sightseeing.
bestTime.zh: 春秋两季通常更适合观光。

description.en: Use the city’s topography as part of the attraction itself.
description.zh: 把城市地形本身作为旅行亮点。

description.en: Make dining and evening energy a core part of the story.
description.zh: 让餐饮与夜间活力成为行程主线。

description.en: Start with the city’s visual identity.
description.zh: 从城市视觉标识切入。

description.en: Combine local food with urban exploration.
description.zh: 把本地美食与城市探索结合起来。

description.en: Keep space for one more viewpoint or shopping stop.
description.zh: 保留最后一个观景点或购物点的空间。

tagline.en: Vast landscapes, Silk Road atmosphere, ethnic diversity, and long-form scenic travel.
tagline.zh: 辽阔地貌、丝路氛围、多元民族风情与长线风景旅行核心目的地。

description.en: Xinjiang suits travelers who want expansive scenery, longer itinerary design, and a more immersive regional journey in China.
description.zh: 新疆适合想要辽阔景观、更长行程设计与更沉浸式区域旅行体验的游客。

highlights.en: Huge landscapes and long-distance scenic routes
highlights.zh: 广阔地貌与长距离风景路线

highlights.en: Silk Road atmosphere and cultural diversity
highlights.zh: 丝路氛围与文化多样性

highlights.en: Strong fit for custom, long-form itineraries
highlights.zh: 非常适合定制化长线行程

idealFor.en: Travelers who are comfortable with longer journeys and want scenery-first travel.
idealFor.zh: 能够接受长线旅行、并以风景为主的旅行者。

bestTime.en: The best month depends on the exact route and the landscapes you want to see.
bestTime.zh: 最佳月份要看具体路线与想看的景观类型。

description.en: Structure the trip around major scenic stretches and long horizons.
description.zh: 围绕主要风景路段和开阔地貌来组织行程。

description.en: Blend scenery with history and local culture stops.
description.zh: 把风景与历史、当地文化停靠点结合起来。

description.en: Set expectations for distances and pacing.
description.zh: 先明确距离与节奏安排。

description.en: Focus on the most visually powerful stretch.
description.zh: 把最有视觉冲击力的路段作为重点。

description.en: Leave room for weather and route adjustments.
description.zh: 给天气与路线调整留出余地。

tagline.en: Mountains, old towns, minority cultures, and one of China’s most varied travel regions.
tagline.zh: 山地、古镇、少数民族文化与中国最丰富多样的旅行区域之一。

description.en: Yunnan is one of the best regions for travelers who want variety: old towns, mountain scenery, lakes, and cultural depth in one trip.
description.zh: 云南非常适合追求多样性的旅行者：古镇、山地风景、湖泊与文化深度可以在一趟行程里同时实现。

highlights.en: Old towns and relaxed regional pace
highlights.zh: 古镇与舒缓的区域节奏

highlights.en: Mountain and lake scenery
highlights.zh: 山地与湖泊风景

highlights.en: Strong minority culture and travel variety
highlights.zh: 鲜明少数民族文化与旅行多样性

idealFor.en: Couples, nature lovers, and travelers who want a rich and flexible route.
idealFor.zh: 情侣、自然爱好者以及希望行程丰富且灵活的旅行者。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn usually work best for comfort and scenery.
bestTime.zh: 春秋两季通常最适合兼顾舒适度与景观。

description.en: Mix heritage towns with scenic water views.
description.zh: 把古镇和湖景组合起来。

description.en: Add minority culture, local markets, and relaxed day pacing.
description.zh: 加入少数民族文化、地方市场与舒缓节奏。

description.en: Start with a low-pressure transition day.
description.zh: 先安排一个低压力过渡日。

description.en: Focus on heritage and local life.
description.zh: 聚焦文化遗产与本地生活。

description.en: Leave one day for scenery and flexibility.
description.zh: 留一天给风景和机动空间。

tagline.en: River scenery, karst mountains, and one of China’s most iconic landscapes.
tagline.zh: 山水、喀斯特地貌与中国最具代表性的自然风景之一。

description.en: Guilin is best for travelers who want one of China’s most famous natural landscapes, with river views, mountains, and easy scenic pacing.
description.zh: 桂林适合想体验中国最著名自然景观之一的旅行者，兼具江景、山景与轻松的风景节奏。

highlights.en: Karst mountain scenery and river views
highlights.zh: 喀斯特山景与江景

highlights.en: Gentle scenic pacing
highlights.zh: 轻松的风景节奏

highlights.en: Great fit for short scenic routes
highlights.zh: 非常适合短途风景线路

idealFor.en: Couples, scenery lovers, and guests building a highlight-based China trip.
idealFor.zh: 情侣、风景爱好者与构建中国亮点线路的客群。

bestTime.en: Most of the year works well, with more comfortable seasons in spring and autumn.
bestTime.zh: 大多数季节都适合，春秋更舒适。

description.en: Let the landscape itself be the main event.
description.zh: 让景观本身成为主要内容。

description.en: Use Guilin as a compact scenic extension to a larger China trip.
description.zh: 把桂林作为更大中国行程中的风景补充。

description.en: Keep the first day focused on easy scenery access.
description.zh: 第一天以轻松看风景为主。

description.en: Build the day around the most iconic landscape moments.
description.zh: 围绕最具代表性的景观时刻来安排。

description.en: Allow time for one last scenic stop or transfer.
description.zh: 留出最后一个风景点或转场时间。

tagline.en: Towering sandstone pillars and one of China’s most cinematic nature destinations.
tagline.zh: 峰林奇观与中国最具电影感的自然目的地之一。

description.en: Zhangjiajie is ideal for travelers who want dramatic natural scenery, viewpoint-based planning, and a destination that feels visually unforgettable.
description.zh: 张家界适合追求震撼自然景观、以观景点为核心安排行程、并希望目的地具有强烈视觉记忆点的旅行者。

highlights.en: Iconic sandstone pillar landscapes
highlights.zh: 标志性的石英砂岩峰林景观

highlights.en: Strong viewpoint and cable-car experiences
highlights.zh: 观景台与缆车体验很强

highlights.en: High visual impact for photo-driven trips
highlights.zh: 非常适合以摄影为主的旅行

idealFor.en: Photographers, scenery-first travelers, and couples planning a dramatic nature route.
idealFor.zh: 摄影爱好者、以风景为主的游客与规划震撼自然线路的情侣。

bestTime.en: Spring and autumn are generally easier for comfortable sightseeing.
bestTime.zh: 春秋两季通常更适合舒适观光。

description.en: Structure the trip around the strongest natural visuals.
description.zh: 围绕最强的自然视觉点来安排行程。

description.en: Use elevation changes and scenic transport as part of the attraction.
description.zh: 把高差与景观交通本身作为旅行亮点。

description.en: Open with an easy first visual impression.
description.zh: 第一天先建立轻松的视觉印象。

description.en: Focus on the most dramatic nature experience.
description.zh: 把最震撼的自然体验放在中心。

description.en: Keep one day flexible in case of weather or route changes.
description.zh: 留出一天机动时间应对天气或线路变化。

tagline.en: Innovation, coastal city energy, and a convenient modern gateway in South China.
tagline.zh: 创新气质、海滨城市活力与华南现代旅行入口。

description.en: Shenzhen is a practical and modern stop for travelers who want a clean, efficient city experience with coastal energy and easy logistics.
description.zh: 深圳适合想要干净、高效、带海滨气质且交通便利的现代城市体验的旅行者。

highlights.en: Modern urban design and innovation culture
highlights.zh: 现代城市设计与创新文化

highlights.en: Coastal energy and convenient logistics
highlights.zh: 海滨活力与便利交通

highlights.en: Good gateway for South China itineraries
highlights.zh: 适合作为华南线路入口

idealFor.en: Business travelers, modern city lovers, and guests connecting South China routes.
idealFor.zh: 商务旅客、现代城市爱好者与衔接华南线路的客群。

bestTime.en: The city works well year-round, with milder seasons often feeling more comfortable.
bestTime.zh: 全年都适合，较温和季节通常更舒适。

title.zh: 现代城市与设计停靠点

description.en: Use the city’s newness and efficiency as part of the brand story.
description.zh: 把城市的新与快作为品牌故事的一部分。

description.en: Position Shenzhen as a smart start or end point for regional travel.
description.zh: 把深圳定位为华南区域旅行的聪明起点或终点。

description.en: Start with a simple introduction to the city’s pace.
description.zh: 先感受城市节奏。

description.en: Use design, shopping, and logistics convenience as the theme.
description.zh: 把设计、购物与便利性作为主题。

description.en: Leave space for onward routing to other South China points.
description.zh: 保留去往华南其他节点的衔接空间。
